header.pendingTip: Pending changes are staged but not live until you reload
header.nothingPending: Nothing pending — nginx is up to date

status.pendingValid: Config test passed — click “Reload nginx” to apply.
status.pendingFailed: Config test FAILED — fix before reloading.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.migratedOf: {{pct}}% of {{count}} migratable routes are on backend B
dashboard.noData: No hosts yet — import a CSV to get started.

hosts.title: Hosts & routes
hosts.newHostHint: Creates a host with a default root route → 192.0.2.1:80, a non-routable placeholder (no backend B). Edit it to your real backend.
hosts.hostToATip: Switch the whole host to backend A
hosts.hostToBTip: Switch the whole host to backend B
hosts.newRouteHint: New route → 192.0.2.1:80 (non-routable placeholder), no backend B.
hosts.confirmDeleteHost: Delete host {{domain}} and all its routes? The .conf file is removed and committed — restore it from History → Rollback.
hosts.confirmBulkB: Switch {{count}} filtered route(s) to backend B?
hosts.confirmBulkA: Switch {{count}} filtered route(s) to backend A?
hosts.emptyImport: Import a CSV to get started.
hosts.help: Click a host name, path, or backend cell (pencil) to edit it. Per-row → A / → B switch one route; host-row → A / → B switch the whole domain.

tester.title: Test path matching — {{domain}}
tester.intro: Enter a request path and see which location block nginx would select, using its real precedence rules (exact › longest prefix › ^~ › first regex).
tester.noMatch: No location matches — nginx would return 404.

import.title: Bulk import / update
import.intro: Upload or paste a CSV. Rows are grouped by domain into one file per host. Import only creates and updates — it never deletes.
import.dropTitle: Click or drag a CSV file here

history.title: Change history
history.intro: Last 50 commits — every action is committed to git. Rollback restores the whole config to a checkpoint and discards every change after it.
history.legendRunning: running = the commit nginx is serving (last reload).
history.legendPending: pending = committed but not live until you reload.
history.confirmRollback: Roll the whole config back to {{hash}}? Every change after this checkpoint is discarded and nginx reloaded.

files.title: Config files
files.warn: Raw editor — saving a broken file can stop nginx loading on the next reload.
files.selectHint: Select a file on the left to edit.
files.disabled: The raw file editor is disabled (FILE_EDITOR=0).

editor.title: Edit {{file}}
editor.saveHint: Saving writes the file, commits a checkpoint, and runs nginx -t. Not applied until you reload.
editor.discard: Discard unsaved edits to this file?

msg.networkError: network error — is the server reachable?
